content:
It seems like the issue is not with the formula syntax, but rather with the way LibreOffice is handling the data. The simple test formulas I created earlier are working correctly, but the more complex formulas are still returning #N/A errors.

At this point, I would recommend trying to troubleshoot the issue further by checking the data in the Data sheet to see if there are any issues with the formatting or the values. You can also try to use a different formula or function to see if that resolves the issue.

If you're still having trouble, I would be happy to try and assist you further.
